title: EssentialsX Chat
description: The chat formatting module for EssentialsX. (requires main module)
body:
**EssentialsX Chat** is an addon for [EssentialsX](https://modrinth.com/plugin/essentialsx), including most of EssentialsX's chat formatting features. It allows you to customise chat formatting on your server by adding prefixes, suffixes and colours in chat, as well as setting different formats for different groups.

You need a matching version of the [main EssentialsX module](https://modrinth.com/plugin/essentialsx) to use this addon module. You also need [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/) and [LuckPerms](https://modrinth.com/plugin/luckperms) to give players prefixes and suffixes, and to detect groups.
